hero.title: Chasing the Azure Horizon: Lessons from the Mediterranean
hero.excerpt: Md. Asraful Sharker Nirob reflects on a summer spent between the ancient cobblestones of Italy and the sapphire waters of the Greek Isles.

author.name: Md. Asraful Sharker Nirob
author.bio: Beyond the algorithm and data sets is a world waiting to be explored through a different lens. This space is my canvas for the stories that don't fit into academic journals—travel, life, and the nuances of the world around us.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtext: Weekly insights on lifestyle, travel, and ideas that matter.

featured.title: The Art of Deliberate Living in a Hyper-Connected World
featured.excerpt: From finding silence in the digital noise that dominates my day, my approach to both life and rigorous academic research.

grid.title: Decoding Global Market Shifts
grid.excerpt: Deep dive into the emerging economic trends and their implications for the technology sector.

grid.title: Beyond the Tourist Trail
grid.excerpt: Discovering the hidden gem of the Amalfi Coast that aren't in any guidebook.

grid.title: The Philosophy of Minimalism in Modern AI
grid.excerpt: Less is more — or is it? Examining the paradox of simplicity in complex systems.

grid.title: Why I Still Kept a Physical Journal on Flights
grid.excerpt: There's something irreplaceable about pen and paper at 35,000 feet.

grid.title: Analyzing the News: A Researcher's Framework
grid.excerpt: How I read media critically — and what I look for between the lines.
